title: Quality Assurance and Quality Control
author: JSL EKOS
description: This module explains the Quality Assurance (QA) and Quality Control (QC) practices followed throughout the stainless steel manufacturing process to ensure that every product meets customer specifications and industry standards.
learningObjectives: Understand the importance of quality in stainless steel manufacturing.
Differentiate between Quality Assurance and Quality Control.
Identify quality checkpoints across the manufacturing process.
Understand defect identification and corrective actions.

content.introduction: Quality is maintained throughout the manufacturing process rather than being inspected only at the end. Every production stage contributes to producing stainless steel that meets customer and industry requirements.
content.purpose: The objective of Quality Assurance and Quality Control is to ensure every stainless steel product satisfies chemical, mechanical, dimensional, and surface quality requirements.
content.summary: Quality Assurance and Quality Control ensure that every stainless steel product manufactured meets the required standards for safety, reliability, performance, and customer satisfaction.
